name: statusline
description: Chat statusline: shows context usage, session token totals and cost under the conversation — in the web dock and the elowen chat CLI. Pick what to display below.

configSchema.label: Context usage
configSchema.hint: Show how full the context window is (percent + tokens).

configSchema.label: Total tokens
configSchema.hint: Show the conversation's cumulative token count.

configSchema.label: Cost
configSchema.hint: Show the conversation's cumulative cost (API-key providers report it; subscriptions show $0).
